message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "Client A" as ClientA
participant "Server" as Server
participant "Client B" as ClientB

note right of ClientA: p1 (0, 0)
note right of Server: p1 (0, 0)
note right of ClientB: p1 (0, 0)

ClientA -> Server: input: move-forward (id: 1)

note left of ClientA: Begin movement animation
note left of ClientA: Finish movement animation

note right of Server: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

note left of ClientA: p1 (0, 1)
note left of Server: p1 (0, 1)

ClientA -> Server: input: move-forward (id: 2)

note left of ClientA: Begin movement animation

Server -> ClientA: update: game-state (ack id: 1)

Server -> ClientB: update: game-state

note left of ClientA: Finish movement animation

note right of Server: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

note left of ClientA: p1 (0, 2)
note left of Server: p1 (0, 2)

Server -> ClientA: update: game-state (ack id: 2)

Server -> ClientB: update: game-state

note right of ClientB: Begin movement animation
note right of ClientB: Finish movement animation

note right of ClientB: p1 (0, 1)

ClientA
Server
ClientB

@enduml
